meaning: adj.[瑙涓夊弶绁炵粡鐨刵.涓夊弶绁炵粡
examples: The objective is to establish a new tractotomy for the treatment of trigeminal neuralgia (TN).
Trigeminal neuralgia, also known as tic douloureux, sometimes is described as the most excruciating pain known to humanity.
The diagnosis is made clinically based on the rash affecting only one dermatome associated with the ophthalmic division of cranial nerve V (trigeminal nerve).
She says when we eat spicy foods, something called our trigeminal nerve is actually irritated.
The reason may be that capsaicin excites the trigeminal nerve, increasing the body's receptiveness to the flavour of other foods.
